issue.title: Clarify step-up authentication semantics for token exchange

comment.body: Should it specify is the acr_values response from idp is exhaustive, or specific to what was missing from the request that cause it to be rejected?

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-identity-chaining/compare/draft-ietf-oauth-identity-chaining-09...draft-ietf-oauth-identity-chaining-10

release.name: draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-16
release.body:
-16

* shepherd review and resulting changes
* use key discovery and validation mechanism instead of Issuer Signature Mechanism
* moved Display Metadata and Claim Metadata to be subsections of SD-JWT VC Type Metadata

## What's Changed
* Remove reference to RFC9901 in abstract by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/396
* Clarify SD-JWT VC encoding format requirements by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/404
* Remove normative language introduction by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/403
* Update figure captions to include 'Example' by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/397
* Fix capitalization in security and privacy considerations by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/400
* Making the OAuth Status List an Informative Reference by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/401
* Nits by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/402
* Improve the intro to the Claim Metadata section by @hannestschofenig in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/398
* shepherd review edits + Move Display & Claim Metadata to be subsections of SD-JWT VC Type Metadata by @bc-pi in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/406

## New Contributors
* @hannestschofenig made their first contribution in https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/396

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/compare/draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-15...draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-16

issue.title: shepherd review edits
issue.body:
Items from https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/msg/oauth/ZaRz6ylO180eZWJTCop7LV4kIS4/ except for "I think Sections 7 and 8 would fit better as subsections of Section 5" which I'm gonna try in this separate 'stacked' PR https://github.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/pull/406

preview of this: https://drafts.oauth.net/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/trying-real-hard-to-be-the-shepherd/draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc.html 

cc @hannestschofenig
